# Tinku — Ritual CreAItivo

> Tinku is the first hackathon in Cartago, Valle del Cauca, Colombia. A 24-hour event on April 17–18, 2026 where developers and innovators build real projects with AI. Organized by The Tribu at Universidad Cooperativa de Colombia.

## Event Overview

- [About Tinku](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#about): What the hackathon is and its mission
- [Schedule](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#schedule): Full 24-hour event timeline

## Tracks

- [Challenge Areas](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#tracks): Sustainability, AI, Education, Cloud AI, Human & Agents

## Prizes

- [Prize Structure](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#prizes): $1,000 USD main prize plus tech credits from Cursor, MiniMax, and Runway

## Rules & Evaluation

- [Delivery Rules](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#rules): Pitch, GitHub repo, and deployment requirements
- [Evaluation Criteria](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#evaluation): Originality, Technical Excellence, Viability, Pitch

## FAQ

- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#faq): Attendance, cost, team formation, what to bring, IP ownership

## Apply

- [Apply to the Hackathon](https://tally.so/r/kdA05d): Registration form

## Blog

- [Event Blog](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/blog): Detailed articles about tracks, tools, and event topics

## Optional

- [Sponsors](https://tinku.thetribu.dev/#sponsors): Organizations supporting the event
